## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? 1-3 bullets. -->

## SDD reference

<!-- If this implements an SDD feature, link the design and spec. -->

- Design: `docs/SDD/<feature>/design.md`
- Spec: `docs/SDD/<feature>/spec.md`

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — adding or fixing tests
- [ ] chore — tooling, build, deps

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] New behavior is covered by a test
- [ ] Ficha schema (if touched) is documented in `agent-ficha-schema` skill
- [ ] No secrets in committed files

## Verification

<!-- How can a reviewer verify this works? Steps, screenshots, commands. -->
